scripts.build:lambda: npm install --omit=dev --omit=optional && node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('lambda-deploy.zip'))fs.unlinkSync('lambda-deploy.zip');execSync('powershell Compress-Archive -Path package.json,server,node_modules -DestinationPath lambda-deploy.zip');console.log('lambda-deploy.zip ready. Size: '+(fs.statSync('lambda-deploy.zip').size/1048576).toFixed(1)+' MB');" && npm install
